inclusions: Flour, groats, meal, starch and pellets of cereals (wheat, meslin, maize, rice, rye, barley, oats, etc.)
Flour, meal and powder of dried leguminous vegetables (heading 07.13), of sago, of roots/tubers (heading 07.14), or of products of Chapter 8
Flour, meal, powder, flakes, granules and pellets of potatoes
Starches (wheat, maize, potato, manioc/cassava, sago, other); inulin
Wheat gluten, whether or not dried
Cereal grains otherwise worked (hulled, rolled, flaked, pearled, sliced or kibbled), except rice of heading 10.06
Germ of cereals, whole, rolled, flaked or ground (always classified in heading 11.04)

exclusions.condition: Roasted malt put up as coffee substitutes
Prepared flours, groats, meals or starches (e.g., mixed with other ingredients, flavoured, or specially processed for retail sale as food preparations)
Corn flakes or other products of heading 19.04 (expanded or roasted cereal grains)
Vegetables, prepared or preserved (e.g., vegetable flours prepared for consumption)
Pharmaceutical products (e.g., medicinal starches or gluten preparations)
Starches having the character of perfumery, cosmetic or toilet preparations
